_comment: Manual overrides for hostnames that do not follow the standard 13-char format. Add any non-standard hostname here to resolve it correctly without touching PHP. Fields: env, customer, product, type, instance are all optional — only provide what you know.

_schema.hostname: exact hostname string as it appears in Zabbix
_schema.note: free-text explanation of why this exception exists

exceptions.note: Legacy naming convention before standard format was enforced
Network switch — not a standard server host

_instructions: Add one object per non-standard hostname in the 'exceptions' array.
The parser checks this file FIRST for any hostname that fails the 13-char positional parse.
If not found here either, the parser falls back to Zabbix hostgroup/tag metadata.
If all fallbacks fail, the host appears with a ⚠ UNRESOLVED badge but is still shown in the timeline.
